title: Enterprise M365 Migration
problem: Legacy on-premises Exchange server with 5,000+ mailboxes reaching end of life, causing frequent outages and high maintenance costs.
solution: Migrated entire organization to Microsoft 365 with Exchange Online, Entra ID synchronization, and modern authentication.
impact: 30% reduced administration effort, zero data loss during migration.

title: Multi-Site VMware Cluster Deployment
problem: Single-site virtualization environment with no DR capability, risking business continuity.
solution: Architected and deployed a multi-site VMware vSphere cluster with vSAN storage and Site Recovery Manager.
impact: Business continuity ensured with 2-hour RTO and 15-minute RPO.

title: Network Security Modernization
problem: Outdated firewall infrastructure with no intrusion prevention, leaving network vulnerable to advanced threats.
solution: Deployed Fortigate firewall clusters with IPS, SSL inspection, SD-WAN, and centralized FortiManager orchestration.
impact: 60% reduction in security incidents, 10x network throughput improvement.

title: AI-Powered Infrastructure Monitoring
problem: Reactive monitoring with no predictive capabilities, causing frequent unplanned downtime.
solution: Implemented AI-driven monitoring solution with predictive analytics, automated remediation, and intelligent alerting.
impact: 92% reduction in unplanned downtime, proactive issue resolution.
